extraction.one_line_summary: KRON Andreas won Stage 6 in a sprint finish marred by SOSA Luis disqualification for irregular sprinting behavior
tactical_patterns: KRON's team executed sustained leadout work across multiple stages despite their sprinter's illness-disrupted form entering the race.
Sprint trajectory shifted from right to left side of road, creating disqualification-level positioning conflict in finale.

rider_signals.KRON Andreas: positive: second WorldTour win despite hard day on Stage 5, showing rapid recovery capacity after Catalunya illness setbacks
rider_signals.SOSA Luis: negative: disqualified for irregular sprint, suggesting desperation or poor positioning discipline under pressure
